current_objective.title: Replace queued API dispatch with direct backend bridge and rich return paths
success_evidence: Runtime binds pycro API calls directly to EngineBackend callables
Return values and errors propagate back to Python without queue drain indirection
Desktop loop lifecycle remains setup() once and update(dt) per frame
Stub generation and typing checks remain deterministic after bridge change
Public API includes draw_text(text, position, font_size, color) backed by runtime and backend contracts
Playable examples are now flat under examples/*.py with shared examples/assets and stopwatch_seconds.py for manual validation
orchestration_evidence: phase-1 objective remains closed with qa-reviewer pass baseline
docs-tracker activated phase-2 objective in tracker and machine state
flow-visualizer updated runtime dispatch diagram for direct API bridge path
qa-reviewer completed pass for this implementation slice with no blocking findings
follow_through_order: direct API bridge with richer return semantics
example-scenario-worker in parallel with playable feature scenarios for manual user validation
